name: Solar Industries India Limited
summary: Solar Industries India Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and supplies industrial explosives and explosive initiating devices in India and internationally. It offers industrial explosives, such as packaged and bulk explosives; and initiating systems, including electronic, non-electric, electric, and plain detonators, as well as cord relays, cast boosters, detonating cords, and aluminium elemented det products. The company also provides defense products, including military explosives, bombs, warheads, ammunitions, and rockets and propellants, as well as initiating systems and pyros, such as fuzes, detonators, ignitors, decoys and flares, and riot control devices. It primarily serves mining and infrastructure sectors. The company was formerly known as Solar Explosives Limited and changed its name to Solar Industries India Limited in February 2009. Solar Industries India Limited was founded in 1983 and is based in Nagpur, India.
